description: Gain familiarity with Mindfulness-Based Stress Reduction interventions that have been shown to increase physician well-being and build resiliency. Cultivate non-judgmental and calm awareness of the present moment. Learn and practice formal and informal mindfulness meditation practices. Research mindfulness skills and their benefits to physicians. Understand guided mindful activities. Adapt individualized mindfulness techniques.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Doctor of Medicine program with fourth year standing

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Doctor of Medicine program with fourth year standing
